action.reasoning: Observation: flip TTA produced no local validation gain (0.793→0.793), and recent ensemble/LDAM experiments regressed substantially. Analysis: the best hidden-eval score is still the calibrated decoupled checkpoint from iteration 6 at 0.8092, so the highest expected value now is to resubmit that known-best single checkpoint rather than spend iterations on low-probability tweaks. Decision: submit checkpoints/best.pt with the current predict.py (single-checkpoint path still supported and TTA defaults off), preserving the best-performing recipe.
